files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections from the Relief Society Magazine's Lesson Department: Theology and Testimony, Teachers' Topic, Literature, and Social Service. Each section has clear subject matter boundaries and different formatting styles. The Literature section includes substantial content about Roman literature and Shakespeare's Julius Caesar, while the Social Service section focuses on children's sleep habits.
